phrases.summary: The statement says that Solomon is the one who fathered/brought forth Rehoboam, establishing a genealogical parent-child relationship.
The statement says that Rehoboam is the one who fathered/brought forth Abijah, continuing the lineage by naming Rehoboam as the parent.
The statement says that Abijah is the one who fathered/brought forth Asa, extending the genealogical chain by identifying Abijah as the parent.
